calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Drew Wheaton for Judith Anderson-Mason and Cynthia Mason .
Susanna T. Kintz appeared by CourtCall for Judith Anderson-Mason and Cynthia Mason.

Mr. Wheaton stated that the verified supplement to the petition for waiver of account, allowance of attorney's fees, and final distribution filed 2/28/19 addressed the Probate Code 9202(b) issues and the outstanding fees regarding Robert Hughes. Mr. Wheaton also stated that the attorney's fees for Robert Hughes are barred since the time had expired and noted that Joan Marie Anderson's partner died in 1994. Ms. Kintz presented argument in support of the petition, stating that the heir of the Estate in this case is the heir of the Estate in the other probate case (PES-17-301436), that the issue with this case is that they can't sell the property from this Estate, that the property was to be distributed "in-kind" to the Estate of Joan Marie Anderson, and that they are trying to get the property into Joan Marie Anderson's Estate. In addition, counsel further stated that the administrators of this Estate are the same in the Joan Marie Anderson's Estate, that the fees will be paid from Joan Marie's Estate, and that they will hold $2,302.36 in their client trust account for costs/fees. At the conclusin of argument, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
